label: Pre B cell
evidence: The label 'Pre B cell' is used by the authors in the cell type annotations of the prenatal skin atlas (Gopee et al., 2024, doi:10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x). Pre-B cells represent a late precursor stage in B cell development, expressing cytoplasmic mu heavy chain and surrogate light chains forming the pre-BCR. They are detected in fetal skin from as early as 7-8 PCW in the related fetal liver study (Popescu et al., 2019).
